body:
# hdf5.cr

[![CI](https://github.com/kojix2/hdf5.cr/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/kojix2/hdf5.cr/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![Lines of Code](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftokei.kojix2.net%2Fbadge%2Fgithub%2Fkojix2%2Fhdf5.cr%2Flines)](https://tokei.kojix2.net/github/kojix2/hdf5.cr)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/PURE-Vibe_Coding-magenta)

HDF5 bindings for Crystal.

## Installation

```yaml
dependencies:
  hdf5:
    github: kojix2/hdf5.cr
```

## Usage

```crystal
require "hdf5"

HDF5::File.open("data.h5", :w) do |file|
  file.write_dataset("values", [1.0, 2.0, 3.0])
  file.set_attribute("title", "example")
end

HDF5::File.open("data.h5", :r) do |file|
  p file.read_dataset("values", Float64)
  p file.get_attribute("title", String)
end
```

## License

MIT

def.name: lib_version
def.body:
maj = uninitialized UInt32
min = uninitialized UInt32
rel = uninitialized UInt32
LibHDF5.H5get_libversion(pointerof(maj), pointerof(min), pointerof(rel))
"#{maj}.#{min}.#{rel}"

def.name: dataspace
def.body:
ensure_open
space_id = LibHDF5.H5Aget_space(@id)
InternalChecks.ensure_hid(space_id, "Failed to get attribute dataspace")
Dataspace.new(space_id)

def.name: datatype
def.body:
ensure_open
type_id = LibHDF5.H5Aget_type(@id)
InternalChecks.ensure_hid(type_id, "Failed to get attribute datatype")
Datatype.new(type_id)

def.name: name
def.body:
ensure_open
size = LibHDF5.H5Aget_name(@id, 0, nil)
if size < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get attribute name size"))
end
buf = Bytes.new(size + 1)
LibHDF5.H5Aget_name(@id, LibC::SizeT.new(size + 1), buf.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(UInt8)))
String.new(buf[0, size])

def.name: read
read_array
def.body:
space_id = LibHDF5.H5Aget_space(@id)
if space_id == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get attribute space"))
end
npoints = LibHDF5.H5Sget_simple_extent_npoints(space_id)
LibHDF5.H5Sclose(space_id)
if npoints < 0
  raise(Error.new("Invalid npoints"))
end
buf = Array(T).new(npoints.to_i, T.zero)
dtype = NativeType.for(T)
read_raw(dtype, buf.to_unsafe)
buf

instance_methods.name: each
instance_methods.doc: Must yield this collection's elements to the block.
instance_methods.summary: Must yield this collection's elements to the block.

def.name: each
def.body:
keys.each do |name|
  attr_id = LibHDF5.H5Aopen(@loc_id, name, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
  if attr_id == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
    next
  end
  attr = Attribute.new(attr_id)
  yield({name, attr})
  attr.close
end

def.name: keys
def.body:
info = uninitialized LibHDF5::ObjInfo
ret = LibHDF5.H5Oget_info3(@loc_id, pointerof(info), LibHDF5::H5O_INFO_NUM_ATTRS)
if ret < 0
  return [] of String
end
n = info.num_attrs.to_i
result = Array(String).new(n)
n.times do |idx|
  attr_id = LibHDF5.H5Aopen_by_idx(@loc_id, ".", LibHDF5::IndexType::Name, LibHDF5::IterOrder::Inc, idx.to_u64, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
  if attr_id == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
    next
  end
  size = LibHDF5.H5Aget_name(attr_id, 0, nil)
  if size > 0
    buf = Bytes.new(size + 1)
    LibHDF5.H5Aget_name(attr_id, LibC::SizeT.new(size + 1), buf.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(UInt8)))
    result << (String.new(buf[0, size]))
  end
  LibHDF5.H5Aclose(attr_id)
end
result

instance_methods.name: none?

def.body:
oid = LibHDF5.H5Oopen(hid, path, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
if oid == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  raise(ObjectNotFoundError.new("Object not found: '#{path}'"))
end
obj_type = LibHDF5.H5Iget_type(oid)
LibHDF5.H5Oclose(oid)
case obj_type
when LibHDF5::H5I_GROUP
  open_group(path)
when LibHDF5::H5I_DATASET
  open_dataset(path)
else
  raise(Error.new("Unknown object type at '#{path}'"))
end

if exists?(path)
  delete(path)
end
create_dataset(path, data)

def.name: create_dataset
def.body:
dims = shape.map(&.to_u64).to_a
resolved_opts = options || (
  build_options(chunk, compression, compression_level, shuffle, fletcher32, max_shape)
)
resolved_type = encoding ? string_type.with_encoding(encoding) : string_type
ds = build_string_dataset(path, dims, resolved_opts, string_type: resolved_type)
TypedDataset(String).new(ds)

def.name: create_group
def.body:
lcpl_id = LibHDF5.H5Pcreate(LibHDF5.h5p_cls_link_create_id_g)
if lcpl_id != LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  LibHDF5.H5Pset_create_intermediate_group(lcpl_id, 1)
end
gid = LibHDF5.H5Gcreate2(hid, path, lcpl_id, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
if lcpl_id != LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  LibHDF5.H5Pclose(lcpl_id)
end
if gid == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  raise(AlreadyExistsError.new("Group already exists: '#{path}'"))
end
Group.new(gid)

g = create_group(path)
begin
  block.call(g)
ensure
  g.close
end

def.body:

  raise(ObjectNotFoundError.new("Link not found: '#{path}'"))

instance_methods.args_html: (filename : String, target_path : String, link_path : String) : Nil

def.name: external_link
def.body:
with_link_create_plist do |lcpl_id|
  ret = LibHDF5.H5Lcreate_external(filename, target_path, hid, link_path, lcpl_id, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
  if ret < 0
    raise(Error.new("Failed to create external link '#{link_path}' -> '#{filename}:#{target_path}'"))
  end
end

def.name: keys
def.body:
info = LibHDF5::GroupInfo.new
ret = LibHDF5.H5Gget_info(hid, pointerof(info))
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get group info"))
end
result = Array(String).new(info.nlinks.to_i)
info.nlinks.times do |idx|
  size = LibHDF5.H5Lget_name_by_idx(hid, ".", LibHDF5::IndexType::Name, LibHDF5::IterOrder::Inc, idx.to_u64, nil, 0, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
  if size <= 0
    next
  end
  buf = Bytes.new(size + 1)
  LibHDF5.H5Lget_name_by_idx(hid, ".", LibHDF5::IndexType::Name, LibHDF5::IterOrder::Inc, idx.to_u64, buf.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(UInt8)), LibC::SizeT.new(size + 1), LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
  result << (String.new(buf[0, size]))
end
result

def.name: link
def.body:
with_link_create_plist do |lcpl_id|
  ret = LibHDF5.H5Lcreate_hard(hid, source_path, hid, destination_path, lcpl_id, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
  if ret < 0
    raise(Error.new("Failed to create hard link from '#{source_path}' to '#{destination_path}'"))
  end
end

def.name: nlinks
def.body:
info = LibHDF5::GroupInfo.new
ret = LibHDF5.H5Gget_info(hid, pointerof(info))
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get group info"))
end
info.nlinks

def.name: object_type
def.body:
oid = LibHDF5.H5Oopen(hid, path, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
if oid == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  raise(ObjectNotFoundError.new("Object not found: '#{path}'"))
end

info = uninitialized LibHDF5::ObjInfo
ret = LibHDF5.H5Oget_info3(oid, pointerof(info), LibHDF5::H5O_INFO_BASIC)
LibHDF5.H5Oclose(oid)
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get object info for '#{path}'"))
end

case info.type
when LibHDF5::ObjType::Group
  :group
when LibHDF5::ObjType::Dataset
  :dataset
when LibHDF5::ObjType::NamedDatatype
  :named_datatype
else
  :unknown
end

def.body:
did = LibHDF5.H5Dopen2(hid, path, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
if did == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  raise(ObjectNotFoundError.new("Dataset not found: '#{path}'"))
end
Dataset.new(did)

end
Group.new(gid)

with_link_create_plist do |lcpl_id|
  ret = LibHDF5.H5Lcreate_soft(target_path, hid, link_path, lcpl_id, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT)
  if ret < 0
    raise(Error.new("Failed to create soft link '#{link_path}' -> '#{target_path}'"))
  end
end

instance_methods.name: read
instance_methods.args_string: (type : T.class, selection : Selection) : Array(T) forall T
instance_methods.args_html: (type : T.class, selection : Selection) : Array(T) forall T

def.name: read
def.body:
file_space = dataspace
begin
  selection.apply_to(file_space.id)
  n = LibHDF5.H5Sget_select_npoints(file_space.id)
  if n <= 0
    raise(Error.new("Invalid selection"))
  end
  mem_space = Dataspace.simple([n.to_u64])
  buf = Array(T).new(n.to_i) do T.zero end
  dtype = NativeType.for(T)
  ret = LibHDF5.H5Dread(@id, dtype, mem_space.id, file_space.id, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, buf.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
  mem_space.close
  if ret < 0
    raise(Error.new("Failed to read dataset with selection"))
  end
  buf
ensure
  file_space.close
end

def.name: read
def.body:
space = dataspace
n = space.npoints
space.close
if n < 0
  raise(Error.new("Invalid dataspace"))
end
buf = Array(T).new(n.to_i) do T.zero end
dtype = NativeType.for(T)
ret = LibHDF5.H5Dread(@id, dtype, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, buf.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to read dataset"))
end
buf

def.name: read_strings
def.body:
file_type = datatype
if file_type.string?
else
  raise(Error.new("Dataset is not string type"))
end

if file_type.variable_length_string?
  type_id = StringType.variable(encoding: file_type.string_encoding, padding: file_type.string_padding).to_hdf5_type_id
  space = dataspace
  n = space.npoints
  if n < 0
    space.close
    LibHDF5.H5Tclose(type_id)
    file_type.close
    raise(Error.new("Invalid dataspace"))
  end
  ptrs = Array(Pointer(UInt8)).new(n.to_i, Pointer(UInt8).null)
  ret = LibHDF5.H5Dread(@id, type_id, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, ptrs.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
  if ret < 0
    space.close
    LibHDF5.H5Tclose(type_id)
    file_type.close
    raise(Error.new("Failed to read string dataset"))
  end

  begin
    return ptrs.map do |ptr| ptr.null? ? "" : String.new(ptr) end
  ensure
    reclaim = LibHDF5.H5Dvlen_reclaim(type_id, space.id, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, ptrs.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
    space.close
    LibHDF5.H5Tclose(type_id)
    file_type.close
    if reclaim < 0
      raise(Error.new("Failed to reclaim variable-length string memory"))
    end
  end
end

if file_type.fixed_length_string?
else
  file_type.close
  raise(Error.new("Unsupported string dataset storage"))
end

space = dataspace
n = space.npoints
if n < 0
  space.close
  file_type.close
  raise(Error.new("Invalid dataspace"))
end

element_size = file_type.size
read_type = (StringType.fixed(element_size, encoding: file_type.string_encoding, padding: file_type.string_padding)).to_hdf5_type_id
buf = Bytes.new(n.to_i * element_size, 0_u8)
ret = LibHDF5.H5Dread(@id, read_type, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, buf.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
LibHDF5.H5Tclose(read_type)
space.close
file_type.close
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to read fixed-length string dataset"))
end
decode_fixed_length_strings(buf, n.to_i, element_size)

instance_methods.name: read_to
instance_methods.args_html: (buf : Pointer(T), type : T.class) forall T

def.name: read_to
def.body:
ensure_open
dtype = NativeType.for(T)
ret = LibHDF5.H5Dread(@id, dtype, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, buf.as(::Pointer(Void)))
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to read dataset"))
end

def.name: resize
def.body:
ensure_open
udims = new_shape.map(&.to_u64).to_a
ret = LibHDF5.H5Dset_extent(@id, udims.to_unsafe)
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to resize dataset"))
end

def.name: shape
def.body:
space = dataspace
begin
  space.dims
ensure
  space.close
end

def.name: size
def.body:
space = dataspace
begin
  n = space.npoints
  n < 0 ? 0_u64 : n.to_u64
ensure
  space.close
end

def.name: write
def.body:
file_space = dataspace
begin
  selection.apply_to(file_space.id)
  n = LibHDF5.H5Sget_select_npoints(file_space.id)
  if data.size != n
    raise(ShapeMismatchError.new("Selection covers #{n} points but data has #{data.size} elements"))
  end
  mem_space = Dataspace.simple([n.to_u64])
  dtype = NativeType.for(T)
  ret = LibHDF5.H5Dwrite(@id, dtype, mem_space.id, file_space.id, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, data.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
  mem_space.close
  if ret < 0
    raise(Error.new("Failed to write dataset with selection"))
  end
ensure
  file_space.close
end

def.name: write
def.body:
ensure_open
dtype = NativeType.for(T)
ret = LibHDF5.H5Dwrite(@id, dtype, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, data.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to write dataset"))
end

def.name: write
def.body:
ensure_open
dtype = NativeType.for(T)
ret = LibHDF5.H5Dwrite(@id, dtype, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, data.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to write dataset"))
end

def.name: write_strings
def.body:
file_type = datatype
if file_type.string?
else
  raise(Error.new("Dataset is not string type"))
end

if file_type.variable_length_string?
  write_type = StringType.variable(encoding: file_type.string_encoding, padding: file_type.string_padding).to_hdf5_type_id
  ptrs = data.map(&.to_unsafe)
  ret = LibHDF5.H5Dwrite(@id, write_type, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, ptrs.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
  LibHDF5.H5Tclose(write_type)
  file_type.close
  if ret < 0
    raise(Error.new("Failed to write string dataset"))
  end
  return
end

if file_type.fixed_length_string?
else
  file_type.close
  raise(Error.new("Unsupported string dataset storage"))
end

element_size = file_type.size
write_type = (StringType.fixed(element_size, encoding: file_type.string_encoding, padding: file_type.string_padding)).to_hdf5_type_id

fixed = fixed_length_buffer(data, element_size, file_type.string_padding)
ret = LibHDF5.H5Dwrite(@id, write_type, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5S_ALL, LibHDF5::H5P_DEFAULT, fixed.to_unsafe.as(::Pointer(Void)))
LibHDF5.H5Tclose(write_type)
file_type.close
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to write fixed-length string dataset"))
end

constructors.name: new
constructors.args_string: (chunk : Array(UInt64) | Nil = nil, compression : Compression | Nil = nil, shuffle : Bool = false, fletcher32 : Bool = false, max_shape : Array(UInt64) | Nil = nil)
constructors.args_html: (chunk : Array(UInt64) | Nil = nil, compression : Compression | Nil = nil, shuffle : Bool = false, fletcher32 : Bool = false, max_shape : Array(UInt64) | Nil = nil)

def.name: new
def.body:
_ = allocate
_.initialize(chunk, compression, shuffle, fletcher32, max_shape)
if _.responds_to?(:finalize)
  ::GC.add_finalizer(_)
end
_

def.name: apply_to
def.body:
chunks = @chunk || shape
LibHDF5.H5Pset_chunk(dcpl_id, chunks.size, chunks.to_unsafe)
if (comp = @compression) && !comp.none?
  case comp.filter
  in Compression::Filter::GZip
    if @shuffle
      LibHDF5.H5Pset_shuffle(dcpl_id)
    end
    LibHDF5.H5Pset_deflate(dcpl_id, comp.level.to_u32)
  in Compression::Filter::None
  end
elsif @shuffle
  LibHDF5.H5Pset_shuffle(dcpl_id)
end
if @fletcher32
  LibHDF5.H5Pset_fletcher32(dcpl_id)
end

end
new(id)

def.name: simple

mdims = max_dims || dims
id = LibHDF5.H5Screate_simple(rank, dims.to_unsafe, mdims.to_unsafe)

  raise(Error.new("Failed to create simple dataspace"))

new(id)

def.name: dims
def.body:
n = ndims
if n <= 0
  return [] of UInt64
end
dims_buf = Array(UInt64).new(n, 0_u64)
LibHDF5.H5Sget_simple_extent_dims(@id, dims_buf.to_unsafe, nil)
dims_buf

def.name: array_dims
def.body:
n = array_rank
if n <= 0
  return [] of UInt64
end
dims = Array(UInt64).new(n, 0_u64)
ret = LibHDF5.H5Tget_array_dims2(@id, dims.to_unsafe)
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get array datatype dimensions"))
end
dims

def.name: array_rank
def.body:
if array?
else
  return 0
end
rank = LibHDF5.H5Tget_array_ndims(@id)
if rank < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get array datatype rank"))
end
rank

def.name: base_type
def.body:
if (enum? || vlen?) || array?
else
  return
end
type_id = LibHDF5.H5Tget_super(@id)
if type_id == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get base datatype"))
end
own(Datatype.new(type_id))

def.name: member
def.body:
if compound?
else
  raise(Error.new("Datatype is not compound"))
end
if index < 0 || index >= member_count
  raise(Error.new("Compound member index out of bounds"))
end

name_ptr = LibHDF5.H5Tget_member_name(@id, index.to_u32)
if name_ptr.null?
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get compound member name"))
end

begin
  type_id = LibHDF5.H5Tget_member_type(@id, index.to_u32)
  if type_id == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
    raise(Error.new("Failed to get compound member datatype"))
  end
  CompoundMember.new(String.new(name_ptr), (LibHDF5.H5Tget_member_offset(@id, index.to_u32)).to_u64, own(Datatype.new(type_id)))
ensure
  LibHDF5.H5free_memory(name_ptr.as(::Pointer(Void)))
end

def.name: member_count
def.body:
if compound?
else
  return 0
end
count = LibHDF5.H5Tget_nmembers(@id)
if count < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get compound member count"))
end
count

def.name: signed?
def.body:
if integer?
else
  return false
end
sign = LibHDF5.H5Tget_sign(@id)
if sign == LibHDF5::Sign::Error
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get integer datatype sign"))
end
sign == LibHDF5::Sign::Two

def.name: size
def.body:
bytes = LibHDF5.H5Tget_size(@id)
if bytes == 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get datatype size"))
end
bytes.to_i32

def.name: string_encoding

else
  raise(Error.new("Datatype is not string"))
end
cset = LibHDF5.H5Tget_cset(@id)
if cset == LibHDF5::CharSet::Error
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get string encoding"))
end
StringEncoding.from_lib(cset)

def.name: string_padding

if string?
else
  raise(Error.new("Datatype is not string"))
end
strpad = LibHDF5.H5Tget_strpad(@id)
if strpad == LibHDF5::StrPad::Error
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get string padding"))
end
StringPadding.from_lib(strpad)

def.name: type_class
def.body:
type_class = LibHDF5.H5Tget_class(@id)
if type_class == LibHDF5::TypeClass::NoClass
  raise(Error.new("Failed to get datatype class"))
end
type_class

def.name: variable_length_string?
def.body:
if string?
else
  return false
end
result = LibHDF5.H5Tis_variable_str(@id)
if result < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to determine whether datatype is variable-length string"))
end
result > 0

constructors.name: hyperslab
constructors.args_string: (start : Indexable, count : Indexable, stride : Indexable | Nil = nil, block : Indexable | Nil = nil) : Selection
constructors.args_html: (start : Indexable, count : Indexable, stride : Indexable | Nil = nil, block : Indexable | Nil = nil) : Selection

def.name: hyperslab
def.body:
rank = start.size
slices = Array(Slice | ::Nil).new(rank) do |i|
  Slice.new(start: start[i].to_i64, count: count[i].to_i64, stride: stride ? stride[i].to_i64 : 1_i64, block: block ? block[i].to_i64 : 1_i64)
end
new(slices)

def.name: apply_to
def.body:
ndims = LibHDF5.H5Sget_simple_extent_ndims(space_id)
actual = Array(LibHDF5::Hsize).new(ndims, 0_u64)
LibHDF5.H5Sget_simple_extent_dims(space_id, actual.to_unsafe, nil)

starts = Array(LibHDF5::Hsize).new(ndims, 0_u64)
counts = Array(LibHDF5::Hsize).new(ndims, 0_u64)
strides = Array(LibHDF5::Hsize).new(ndims, 1_u64)
blocks = Array(LibHDF5::Hsize).new(ndims, 1_u64)

@slices.each_with_index do |slice, idx|
  if idx >= ndims
    break
  end
  if slice
    starts[idx] = slice.start.to_u64
    counts[idx] = slice.count.to_u64
    strides[idx] = slice.stride.to_u64
    blocks[idx] = slice.block.to_u64
  else
    starts[idx] = 0_u64
    counts[idx] = actual[idx]
    strides[idx] = 1_u64
    blocks[idx] = 1_u64
  end
end

ret = LibHDF5.H5Sselect_hyperslab(space_id, 0, starts.to_unsafe, strides.to_unsafe, counts.to_unsafe, blocks.to_unsafe)
if ret < 0
  raise(Error.new("Failed to apply selection"))
end

constructors.args_html: (start : Int64, count : Int64, stride : Int64 = 1_i64, block : Int64 = 1_i64)

def.body:
_ = allocate
_.initialize(start, count, stride, block)
if _.responds_to?(:finalize)
  ::GC.add_finalizer(_)
end
_

slices = Array(Selection::Slice | ::Nil).new
dims.each do |dim|
  slices << (parse_dim(dim))
end
Selection.new(slices)

def.name: from_lib
def.body:
case value
when LibHDF5::CharSet::Ascii
  Ascii
when LibHDF5::CharSet::Utf8
  Utf8
else
  raise(Error.new("Unknown HDF5 string character set: #{value}"))
end

def.name: parse
def.body:
case value
in StringEncoding
  value
in Symbol
  case value
  when :ascii
    Ascii
  when :utf8
    Utf8
  else
    raise(Error.new("Unsupported string encoding: #{value}"))
  end
end

instance_methods.doc: Returns `true` if this enum value equals `Ascii`

instance_methods.name: utf8?
instance_methods.doc: Returns `true` if this enum value equals `Utf8`

def.name: from_lib
def.body:
case value
when LibHDF5::StrPad::NullTerm
  NullTerm
when LibHDF5::StrPad::NullPad
  NullPad
when LibHDF5::StrPad::SpacePad
  SpacePad
else
  raise(Error.new("Unknown HDF5 string padding mode: #{value}"))
end

constructors.args_html: (size : Int, encoding : Symbol | StringEncoding = StringEncoding::Utf8, padding : StringPadding = StringPadding::NullPad) : StringType

constructors.args_string: (size : Int32 | Nil, encoding : StringEncoding, padding : StringPadding)

constructors.name: variable
constructors.args_string: (encoding : Symbol | StringEncoding = StringEncoding::Utf8, padding : StringPadding = StringPadding::NullTerm) : StringType
constructors.args_html: (encoding : Symbol | StringEncoding = StringEncoding::Utf8, padding : StringPadding = StringPadding::NullTerm) : StringType

def.name: to_hdf5_type_id
def.body:
type_id = LibHDF5.H5Tcopy(LibHDF5.h5t_c_s1_g)
if type_id == LibHDF5::H5_INVALID_HID
  raise(Error.new("Failed to copy string type"))
end

size_value = if variable?
  LibC::SizeT::MAX
else
  fixed_size = (@size || (raise(Error.new("Fixed string type requires size")))).as(Int32)
  fixed_size.to_u64
end
ret = LibHDF5.H5Tset_size(type_id, size_value)
if ret < 0
  LibHDF5.H5Tclose(type_id)
  raise(Error.new("Failed to set string size"))
end

ret = LibHDF5.H5Tset_cset(type_id, string_encoding_to_lib(@encoding))
if ret < 0
  LibHDF5.H5Tclose(type_id)
  raise(Error.new("Failed to set string encoding"))
end

ret = LibHDF5.H5Tset_strpad(type_id, (string_padding_to_lib(@padding)).value)
if ret < 0
  LibHDF5.H5Tclose(type_id)
  raise(Error.new("Failed to set string padding"))
end

type_id

def.name: read
write
write
